text:
- Update to 0.9.6
- Removed patch due of REINPLACE in the Makefile
- Added "for" to install docs
- Changed pkg-plist
- unnecessary have RUN and BUILD_DEPENDS due of "USE_PYTHON"

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-setup.py
